auth.inviteMessage: You've been invited to join. Complete your registration below.
auth.nameMinLength: Name must be at least 2 characters
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.passwordComplexity: Password must contain uppercase, lowercase, and a number

dashboard.subtitle: Here's what's happening in your community

profile.title: Profile Information
profile.subtitle: Update your name, email and avatar.

accounts.title: Connected Accounts
accounts.subtitle: Link social accounts for easier sign-in.

password.setSubtitle: Set a password so you can also sign in with email.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.subtitle: Manage your membership plan.
subscription.canceling: Cancels at end of billing period

appearance.title: Theme
appearance.subtitle: Choose the look and feel of the platform.

notifications.digestSubtitle: Get a summary of new posts, events, and notifications delivered to your inbox.
notifications.dailyDesc: Receive a summary every morning at 8 AM
notifications.weeklyDesc: Receive a summary every Monday at 8 AM
notifications.calendarSubtitle: Receive .ics calendar invites when you RSVP to events.
notifications.calendarDesc: Attach an .ics file to the RSVP confirmation email so it appears in your calendar app.
notifications.remindersSubtitle: Get reminded about upcoming events you've RSVP'd to.
notifications.remindersDesc: Receive email reminders 24 hours and 1 hour before events you're attending.
notifications.pushDesc: Receive push notifications in your browser.
notifications.marketingDesc: Receive updates about new features and promotions.

privacy.title: Privacy & Data
privacy.subtitle: Manage your data and privacy settings.
privacy.gdprDescription: You have the right to access, correct, export or delete your personal data at any time. We only store data necessary to provide the service and never sell your data to third parties.
privacy.deleteConfirmation: Permanently delete your account? This cannot be undone.

aiCoach.title: Coach
aiCoach.subtitle: Your virtual leadership development coach
aiCoach.notConfigured: The AI Coach feature is not yet configured on this platform. Contact your administrator.
aiCoach.emptyState: Ask me anything about leadership, personal development, or your GROWTH assessment results.
aiCoach.error: Sorry, I encountered an error. Please try again.

prompts.leadership: How can I improve my leadership skills?
prompts.balance: I struggle with work-life balance. Any tips?
prompts.habits: Help me build better daily habits.
prompts.conversations: How do I handle difficult conversations with my team?
